1.title: Account Unlock Attempt 1 of 3
1.message: A one-time passcode has been sent to your registered contact method. Please enter it below to unlock your account.

2.title: Account Unlock Attempt 2 of 3
2.message: Your previous unlock attempt was unsuccessful. Please try again with the new passcode sent to your registered contact method.

3.title: Final Account Unlock Attempt
3.message: This is your last attempt to unlock your account today. If this attempt fails, your account will remain locked until tomorrow.

exhausted.title: Account Unlock Unavailable
exhausted.message: You have exceeded the maximum number of unlock attempts for today. Please try again tomorrow or contact customer support for assistance.

success.title: Account Unlocked
success.message: Your account has been successfully unlocked. You may now proceed.

1.title: Passcode Resent (1 of 3)
1.message: A new one-time passcode has been sent to your registered contact method. Please allow a moment for delivery.

2.title: Passcode Resent (2 of 3)
2.message: A new one-time passcode has been sent. You have 1 resend attempt remaining.

3.title: Final Passcode Resent
3.message: A new one-time passcode has been sent. This was your last available resend. Please check your registered contact method.

exhausted.title: Resend Limit Reached
exhausted.message: You have used all available passcode resend attempts for today. Please try again tomorrow or contact customer support for assistance.

success.title: Passcode Sent
success.message: A new one-time passcode has been sent to your registered contact method.

invalidCredentials.title: Invalid Credentials
invalidCredentials.message: The username or password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.

accountLocked.title: Account Locked
accountLocked.message: Your account has been locked due to too many failed login attempts. Please use the unlock option or contact customer support.

invalidOtp.title: Invalid Passcode
invalidOtp.message: The one-time passcode you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.

expiredOtp.title: Passcode Expired
expiredOtp.message: Your one-time passcode has expired. Please request a new one.

otpAttemptsExhausted.title: Too Many Failed Attempts
otpAttemptsExhausted.message: You have exceeded the maximum number of passcode verification attempts. Please request a new passcode or contact customer support.

tokenExpired.title: Link Expired
tokenExpired.message: The link you used has expired. Please request a new invitation link to continue.

tokenInvalid.title: Invalid Link
tokenInvalid.message: The link you used is invalid or has already been used. Please contact the account owner to request a new invitation.

networkError.title: Connection Error
networkError.message: We were unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.

serverError.title: Server Error
serverError.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later. If the problem persists, contact customer support.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized Access
unauthorized.message: You are not authorized to perform this action. Please log in again.

accountNotFound.title: Account Not Found
accountNotFound.message: The account you are looking for could not be found. Please verify the account information and try again.

signerLimitReached.title: Signer Limit Reached
signerLimitReached.message: The maximum number of authorized signers has been reached for this account. Please remove an existing signer before adding a new one.

duplicateSigner.title: Duplicate Signer
duplicateSigner.message: A signer with the same information already exists on this account. Please review the existing signers.

submissionFailed.title: Submission Failed
submissionFailed.message: We were unable to submit your signature card changes. Please review your information and try again.

otpVerified.title: Identity Verified
otpVerified.message: Your identity has been successfully verified. You may now proceed.

signerAdded.title: Signer Added
signerAdded.message: The new authorized signer has been successfully added to the account.

signerUpdated.title: Signer Updated
signerUpdated.message: The signer information has been successfully updated.

signerRemoved.title: Signer Removed
signerRemoved.message: The signer has been successfully removed from the account.

signatureCardSubmitted.title: Signature Card Submitted
signatureCardSubmitted.message: Your updated signature card has been submitted for processing. You will receive a confirmation once the changes have been reviewed and approved.

invitationSent.title: Invitation Sent
invitationSent.message: An invitation has been sent to the new signer at their registered contact method.

timeoutWarning.title: Session Expiring Soon
timeoutWarning.message: Your session will expire in 2 minutes due to inactivity. Would you like to continue?

expired.title: Session Expired
expired.message: Your session has expired due to inactivity. Please log in again to continue.

loggedOut.title: Logged Out
loggedOut.message: You have been successfully logged out.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number.
validation.invalidSSN: Please enter a valid 9-digit Social Security Number.
validation.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a number, and a special character.
validation.otpFormat: Please enter a valid 6-digit one-time passcode.
validation.nameFormat: Name may only contain letters, hyphens, apostrophes, and spaces.
validation.confirmationRequired: Please confirm your changes before submitting.

removeSigner.title: Remove Signer
removeSigner.message: Are you sure you want to remove {signerName} as an authorized signer on this account? This action cannot be undone.

submitChanges.title: Submit Signature Card Changes
submitChanges.message: You are about to submit changes to the authorized signers on this account. Please review all changes carefully before proceeding.

cancelChanges.title: Discard Changes
cancelChanges.message: Are you sure you want to discard your changes? Any unsaved modifications will be lost.

logout.title: Log Out
logout.message: Are you sure you want to log out? Any unsaved changes will be lost.

attemptsRemaining.1: Warning: You have 1 login attempt remaining before your account is locked.

login.locked: Your account has been locked due to too many failed login attempts. Please use the unlock option or contact customer support.
